content: Hey, I'm so glad to be talking to you. I just moved to Berlin, Germany and I'm loving it so far.
Welcome to Berlin! It's a great city. What do you like to do in your free time?
I love hiking and exploring the outdoors. I've been trying to get out to the nearby parks and forests as much as possible. I also have a border collie named Thor who loves to come with me.
That sounds like a lot of fun. What kind of work do you do?
I'm an Environmental Policy Advisor, so I work with governments and organizations to develop sustainable policies. It's really rewarding work.
That's great. It's wonderful that you're passionate about environmental issues. Do you have any favorite hobbies or activities?
I love baking sourdough bread and maintaining my aquarium. There's something about the process of creating something and watching it thrive that I love.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who's into aquariums before. What kind of fish do you have?
I have a few different species, but my favorite are the neon tetras. They're so colorful and active. I've been thinking of getting a new tank and setting it up in my living room.
That sounds like a great idea. Do you have any experience with setting up aquariums?

Yeah, I've been keeping aquariums for about 15 years now. I love the challenge of creating a balanced ecosystem and watching the fish thrive. I've also been getting into drone photography, which is a lot of fun.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who's into drone photography before. What kind of shots do you like to take?
I love taking aerial shots of the city and the countryside. It's amazing to see things from a new perspective. I've been thinking of taking a trip to the Alps next year to get some amazing shots.
That sounds like an amazing trip. I'm sure you'll get some incredible footage. What inspired you to start doing drone photography?
I've always been interested in photography and technology, so drone photography seemed like a natural fit. I started about 5 years ago and have been hooked ever since.
That's great. It's wonderful that you've found a hobby that you're so passionate about. Do you have any upcoming events or projects that you're working on?
Yeah, I'm working on a project to develop a sustainable policy for the city of Berlin, which is due on January 15th. It's a lot of work, but I'm excited to see the impact it will have.
